nasb.text: Now the angel of the Lord found her by a spring of water in the wilderness, by the spring on the way to Shur.

esv.text: The angel of the Lord found her by a spring of water in the wilderness, the spring on the way to Shur.

cnv.text: 耶和華的使者在曠野的水泉旁邊，就是在到書珥路上的水旁邊，遇到了她，

ccb.text: 耶和华的天使在旷野中通往书珥之路的水泉旁找到了夏甲，

csbs.text: 耶和华的使者在旷野的水泉旁，就是书珥路上的水泉旁，找到了夏甲，
